arts.ttl: Union Saint-Gilloise in form again for Rangers test
arts.sum: Union Saint-Gilloise kept faith with their inexperienced manager after a downturn and have experienced an upturn in form, writes Alasdair Lamont.

arts.ttl: Preview: Rangers vs. Union SG - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Rangers and Union SG, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
